titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Qasim Ibn Urwah
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Qasim Ibn Urwah

segments: ه عن القاسم بن عروة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه ابن جعفر الحميريّ، عن هارون بن مسلم بن سعدان، عن القاسم بن عروة.
arabic.text: ه عن القاسم بن عروة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه ابن جعفر الحميريّ، عن هارون بن مسلم بن سعدان، عن القاسم بن عروة.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Qasim ibn Urwah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Harun ibn Muslim ibn Sadan, from Al-Qasim ibn Urwah.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Qasim ibn Urwah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Harun ibn Muslim ibn Sadan, from Al-Qasim ibn Urwah.
